title: Better Swords
description: This texture pack gives all swords a fresh new look
body:
This texture pack gives all swords a fresh new look — clean, sleek, and unique!
It also features transparent GUIs for a cleaner and more immersive gameplay experience.
Perfect for PvP or just spicing up your visuals without changing the whole game.

- ✔️ Custom Sword Textures
- ✔️ Transparent Inventory, Chest, and Crafting Menus
- ✔️ Lightweight & PvP Friendly
